source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for distsql_test.go

symptoms: - c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")
failure_signature: - c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates `executor/distsql_test.go` from pingcap check (gocheck) style to testify-based tests, and it also removes `t.Parallel()` from a number of tests. Running these tests in parallel can be unstable when they touch shared fixtures/resources (e.g., mock stores/domains and package-level state). The patch stabilizes the suite by keeping the migrated tests running serially (no `t.Parallel()`), reducing cross-test interference under concurrent execution.
fix_pattern: Migrate legacy pingcap check (gocheck) tests to testify and avoid parallel execution for shared-state tests (remove `t.Parallel()`).

evidence: evidence: - c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")
